calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2008 Continued To Jan-23-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karla Ellis-Davis, #12998.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Jose Rodriguez, individually and dba Kacho Trucking.
Default entered against defendant on October 24, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 22, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 10, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Jose Rodriguez, individually and dba Kacho Trucking as follows:

Damages/Principal - $32,349.68.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,533.96.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $456.60, for a total judgment in the amount of $37,840.24.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
